i18n.popup.dots.title: Right-click on ⋯
i18n.popup.dots.hint: What right-clicking a card's ⋯ does. “Nothing” keeps the native menu.
i18n.popup.hl.addHint: Auto entries match exactly; the ones you add here are keywords (matched inside title + artist).
i18n.opt.flashAuto.label: Auto-select the highest Flash model
i18n.opt.flashAuto.hint: Before sending, pick the Flash model with the highest version (never Pro). If there's no picker, it continues unchanged.
i18n.toast.saveSendNoThanks: Send not confirmed — lyrics NOT downloaded
i18n.popup.info.amazonMusic: Searches for the song on Amazon Music.
i18n.popup.info.gemReview: Sends the Transcript lyrics to the transcription Gem for review; when the correction is ready it is copied to your clipboard.
i18n.popup.info.saveSend: Button anchored next to Send: saves the lyrics as .txt and then presses Send. The Send button alone no longer saves anything.
i18n.popup.info.slackInvite: Opens the song's public page, grabs the last contributor's profile link and fills in the Slack invitation Typeform automatically.
i18n.popup.info.wrapParens: Wraps the selected text in ( ). The checkbox decides whether it starts with an uppercase or lowercase letter.
i18n.popup.info.wrapQuestion: Wraps the selected text in ¿ ?. The checkbox decides whether it starts with an uppercase or lowercase letter.
i18n.popup.info.wrapExclaim: Wraps the selected text in ¡ !. The checkbox decides whether it starts with an uppercase or lowercase letter.
i18n.popup.info.openWeb: Opens the song's public page on musixmatch.com (the first item in Track info).
i18n.popup.info.resetSync: Triggers the “reset sync” item of the editor's ⋯ menu in one click.
i18n.toast.openWebFailed: Couldn't open the song's page (Track info not found).
i18n.toast.resetSyncConfirm: Confirm the restart in the dialog.
i18n.opt.slackTypeform.label: Slack invitation Typeform URL
i18n.opt.slackTypeform.hint: Prefilled by default; change it only if the form's link changes.
i18n.toast.openingReview: Sending the lyrics to the Gem for review…
i18n.toast.slackFailed: Couldn't open the song's page (Track info)
i18n.toast.saveSendConfirm: You are about to send the contribution — press again to confirm.
i18n.banner.reviewWaiting: Reviewing lyrics… the correction will be copied automatically
i18n.banner.reviewTimeout: The Gem took too long. Copy the answer manually.
i18n.banner.reviewNoAnswer: Couldn't read the Gem's answer. Copy it manually.
i18n.banner.reviewCopyFailed: Couldn't copy automatically — use the button to copy
i18n.sf.noStart: Couldn't find the form's Start button. The profile link is on your clipboard.
i18n.sf.noCurator: Couldn't find the Curator option. The profile link is on your clipboard.
i18n.sf.noInput: The link field didn't show up. The profile link is on your clipboard.
i18n.sf.noSubmit: Couldn't find Submit — review and send manually.
i18n.sf.dryRun: DRY RUN: everything filled in, Submit NOT clicked.
i18n.popup.title: MxM Tools
i18n.popup.sc.hint: Click the key and press the combination you want. ↺ restores the default. Esc cancels.
i18n.popup.sc.conflict: That key is already used by “{name}”. Try another one.
i18n.popup.baseline.notTask: This tab is not a Musixmatch task
i18n.toast.alreadySaved: ✓ Original for this task already saved
i18n.toast.alreadySavedRestored: ✓ Original already saved (came from a restored draft)
i18n.toast.captured: ✓ Original captured when the task was opened
i18n.toast.capturedRestored: ✓ Original saved — NOTE: a draft was restored, it may include previous edits
i18n.toast.captureFailed: ⚠ Couldn't capture the original — save it from the extension popup
i18n.toast.noBaseline: Original not captured — save it from the extension popup
i18n.toast.noGemUrl: Set the Gem URL in the extension options
i18n.toast.openingGem: Opening the Gem… the prompt pastes itself
i18n.toast.openingChain: Opening Diffchecker; the diff saves itself and the Gem starts on its own…
i18n.toast.ytFallback: No clear match — opening YouTube results
i18n.toast.ytError: YouTube search failed — opening results page
i18n.banner.noEditor: Couldn't find the Gemini editor. The prompt is in your clipboard: paste it with Cmd+V.
i18n.banner.pasteFailed: Couldn't paste the prompt. It's in your clipboard: paste it with Cmd+V.
i18n.banner.sendFailed: Prompt pasted; couldn't send it automatically. Press Enter or the send button.
i18n.banner.copied: Prompt copied. Paste it with Cmd+V.
i18n.dc.titleFailed: Couldn't name the diff — it's copied to your clipboard, paste it manually.
i18n.dc.noModal: Couldn't open the Save modal with the title; continuing to the Gem without a link.
i18n.dc.noSaveBtn: Couldn't find the Save button; continuing to the Gem without a link.
i18n.dc.notSaved: The diff didn't finish saving; the Gem starts without a link.
i18n.dc.fallbackLeft: Original copied. Paste it into the left field (Cmd+V).
i18n.dc.editedCopied: Edited copied. Paste it into the right field.
i18n.opt.title: MxM Tools — Options
i18n.opt.gemUrl.label: Transcription Gem URL
i18n.opt.gemUrl.hint: Open your Gem in Gemini and copy the URL from the address bar.
i18n.opt.uiMode.label: How to pick the video
i18n.opt.ytMethod.label: YouTube search method
i18n.opt.ytMethod.browser: Open YouTube and search by hand (human)
i18n.opt.ytMethod.hint: “By hand” opens a YouTube tab, pastes the search in one go and reads the results from the DOM (without playing any video). It usually matches better but is slower and opens/closes a tab per song.
i18n.opt.autoThreshold.label: Auto threshold (score %)
i18n.opt.autoThreshold.hint: If the best candidate reaches this, it's sent without asking.
i18n.opt.numCandidates.label: Candidates to show
i18n.opt.template.label: Message to the Gem
i18n.opt.delay.label: Wait for the Gem to load (ms)
i18n.opt.delay.hint: After opening the Gem tab, wait this long before typing the URL and sending. Default 3000. If the Gem ignores its instructions, raise it (e.g. 4000–5000).
i18n.opt.bg.label: Open tabs in the background
i18n.opt.bg.hint: The tabs this feature opens (Gem and YouTube) open behind, without leaving where you are. Off: you jump to the new tab. (The video picker still comes to the front when you must choose.)
i18n.opt.menu.label: Enable “Gem” option in Musixmatch Studio
i18n.opt.menu.hint: Adds a “Gem” item to the three-dots menu of every task in The Jukebox. On by default.
i18n.opt.rightclick.label: Right-click on the three dots → send to Gem
i18n.opt.rightclick.hint: Shortcut: right-click a task's three dots and it fires straight away, without opening the menu. On by default.
i18n.opt.shortcut.label: Keyboard shortcut
i18n.opt.shortcut.hint: Configured from the extension popup (click its icon in the toolbar → “Functions & shortcuts”). Default ⌥G.
i18n.opt.msgGemUrl.label: Contributor-message Gem URL
i18n.opt.msgGemUrl.hint: The Gem that writes the message to the contributor (Compare / Chain buttons).
i18n.opt.curator.label: Curator signature
i18n.opt.diffMode.label: Compare mode
i18n.overlay.title: 🎵 Choose the video to send to the Gem
i18n.opt.reviewTemplate.label: Review prompt (Gem)
i18n.opt.msgTemplate.label: Message to the contributor (prompt)
i18n.popup.sc.label: Shortcut:
i18n.popup.info.typeform1: Opens the Slack curators invitation Typeform (prefilled with your name and email).
i18n.popup.info.contribProfile: Opens the public lyrics page and jumps to the last contributor's profile.
i18n.popup.info.groupSwitch: When on, these buttons collapse into a single button that expands when you hover over it. When off, they show separately.
i18n.popup.btnStyle.groupHint: The gem and streaming buttons collapse into one; hover it to fan them out to the left.
i18n.popup.info.autoAssistant: Closes the editor's Assistant panel by itself, 2 seconds after a task loads.
i18n.popup.info.save: Downloads the current lyrics as “Song - Artist.txt” into Downloads/<base folder>/<folder>. The checkbox also saves automatically when you press Send.
i18n.popup.info.unir: Merges the current line with the previous one. Put the cursor on a line and press the shortcut.
i18n.popup.info.split: Splits the current line at the cursor position into two lines.
i18n.popup.info.unirParens: Like Join lines, but the joined text stays wrapped in parentheses. The checkbox controls whether it starts uppercase or lowercase.
i18n.popup.info.wordCounter: Press ⌘A/Ctrl+A twice (2nd within ~0.4s) to show words/characters of the selection while held. ⌥X turns it on/off.
i18n.popup.info.gem: With text selected, searches YouTube and sends the video to your transcription Gem. From the popup it uses the open task's song.
i18n.popup.info.instrumental: Types #INSTRUMENTAL at the cursor position (focus a lyrics line first).
i18n.popup.info.youtube: Searches the song and opens the best-matching video (or the results page if unsure).
i18n.popup.info.google: Opens a Google search for “song artist”.
i18n.popup.info.spotify: Opens a Spotify search for the song.
i18n.popup.info.appleMusic: Opens an Apple Music search for the song.
i18n.popup.info.compare: Diff of the original vs. edited lyrics (Diffchecker or built-in view).
i18n.popup.info.diffgenie: All-in-one: saves the diff on Diffchecker and opens the Gem with the contributor message. Only on the lyrics tab.
i18n.popup.info.contributorName: Shows the last contributor's name for a few seconds.
i18n.popup.info.findReplace: Opens the editor's Find and replace with one click.
i18n.popup.hl.hint: Select text and apply a list (its shortcut or “Apply”). All occurrences get highlighted and persist across reloads. Only on Musixmatch.
i18n.popup.hl.autoMarkHint: Marks in the task list the songs you already opened, so you don't open them again.
i18n.popup.hl.openedHint: Songs marked as already opened. Right-click a task to mark/unmark it.
i18n.opt.reportName.label: Your name (for the forms)
i18n.opt.reportName.hint: Prefills the shared name field of the Typeforms (Slack invite, etc.).
i18n.opt.reportEmail.label: Your email (for the forms)
i18n.opt.reportEmail.hint: Prefills the email field so the Typeform skips its first screen.
i18n.slack.needConfig.title: Missing name and email
i18n.slack.needConfig.body: The forms need your name and email. Set them in the extension's advanced options, or fill them in manually at the launcher.
i18n.popup.info.contributorAutoCheck: When opening a task, automatically check the last contributor (opens the ⋯ history modal for ~5s).
i18n.popup.save.byDate: Saved in a folder named with today's date (YYYY-MM-DD).
i18n.toast.saveIdentical: Identical to the last saved version — not saved again
i18n.popup.info.contributorLabel: Shows the last contributor's name (small, bottom-right) whenever you open a task; marks AI Assistants.
i18n.popup.info.autoContinue: When a task is sent, automatically clicks “Continue” on the “Thanks for your contribution” dialog.
i18n.toast.contributorEmpty: This task has no contributions yet
i18n.toast.menuItemFail: Couldn't open that editor menu item
i18n.toast.instrumentalNoFocus: Place the cursor in a text field first
i18n.opt.anim.label: Floating buttons entrance animation
i18n.opt.anim.hint: Plays when a task opens. “Random” picks a different one each time.
i18n.opt.savePath.label: Base folder (inside Downloads)
i18n.opt.savePath.hint: Relative to your Downloads folder. The per-song folder is picked in the popup (Buttons tab → Save).
i18n.opt.backup.hint: Save all your settings (shortcuts, buttons, highlighter lists, Gems…) to a file and import it later or on another computer.

info.info.title: MxM Tools
info.info.sub: Complete guide to features, Gem setup and shortcuts. Valid for macOS, Windows and Linux.
info.info.osNote: Keys per system: on macOS shortcuts use ⌥ (Option/Alt). On Windows and Linux that key is Alt. Where it says ⌥A, on Windows/Linux read Alt+A. Every shortcut is reconfigurable from the popup.
info.info.s1.p1: They appear only inside a task editor (not in lists or missions). Drag them to move them; they re-stack when you toggle buttons in the popup (Buttons tab). Hover over a button to see its name.
info.info.s1.p2: From the popup's Buttons tab you can also: reorder them by drag & drop (press “Reorder”, drag the rows, then “Done” — that order defines the floating stack, top of the list = top of the stack), switch between color and black & white (B&W is the default and follows your system's dark mode), choose square (default) or round shape, and reset positions after dragging. Buttons that open a tab load it in the background by default (configurable per button). When you leave the editor the buttons slide away to the right.
info.info.s1.foot: Every button can also be fired from the popup with ▶, in case you prefer no floating buttons.
info.info.s1.grouping: Group buttons (Buttons tab, on by default): the two gem buttons collapse into one plain diamond, and the streaming buttons into one music note; hover the button and its members fan out to the left.
info.info.s2.assistant: The Auto-close Assistant panel toggle (Functions tab, no shortcut) closes the editor's Assistant panel by itself 2 seconds after a task loads.
info.info.s2.contributorLabel: The Fixed contributor label toggle (Functions tab, on by default) shows the last contributor's name in small type at the bottom-right whenever you open a task, and flags it when it's an AI Assistant.
info.info.s2.autoContinue: The Auto-click “Continue” toggle (Functions tab, off by default) closes the “Thanks for your contribution” dialog by itself after you send a task.
info.info.s2.slackConfig: For the Slack invitation request, set your name and email in the advanced options — they prefill the Typeform so it skips its first screen.
info.info.s3.p1: The Save button downloads the current lyrics as Song - Artist.txt into Downloads/<base folder>/<folder>. Pick the folder (and create new ones) in the popup under the Save button; the base folder lives in Advanced options. If you're not on the Transcript tab it switches there first to read the full text.
info.info.s3.p2: The Save & Send button sits right next to the editor's Send button: it saves the lyrics as .txt (switching to Transcript first if needed) and then presses Send for you. Pressing Send alone does NOT save anything.
info.info.s4.h: 4. Setting up the Gems (step by step)
info.info.s4.p1: The extension uses two Gemini Gems, with separate URLs in Advanced options:
info.info.s4.li1: Go to gemini.google.com and sign in.
info.info.s4.li2: Create a new Gem (side menu → “Explore Gems” → “New Gem”).
info.info.s4.li3: Paste the corresponding prompt into its instructions (below).
info.info.s4.li4: Save the Gem, open it, and copy the URL from the address bar (it looks like https://gemini.google.com/gem/…).
info.info.s4.li5: Paste that URL in Options: the transcription one in “Transcription Gem URL”, the message one in “Contributor message Gem URL”.
info.info.s4.gem1p: Receives the YouTube link (and duration) and returns the transcription. The Gem lyrics review button uses this same Gem: it pastes the Transcript lyrics instead of the link and copies the corrected answer to your clipboard.
info.info.s4.gem2p: Receives the original lyrics, the corrected ones and the contributor data, and writes the message.
info.info.s5.p1: Works only on Musixmatch. In the popup's “Highlighter” tab:
info.info.s5.li1: Create lists with a name, a color and (optionally) a keyboard shortcut.
info.info.s5.li2: Select text on the page and apply a list: with its shortcut, or with that list's “Apply” button in the popup. All occurrences of the phrase get highlighted and persist across reloads.
info.info.s5.li3: Auto-mark opened songs: marks in the task list the songs you already opened, so you don't enter them again. Configurable: “on open” or “on open without completing”.
info.info.s5.li4: New: the mark color is configurable (pastel green by default) and you can mark/unmark any song by hand with a single right-click on its card — the browser's context menu still appears; the ⋯ button stays reserved.
info.info.s5.note: Note: the highlighter works on normal page text (titles, guides, data); it can't paint inside the editable lyrics field (it's a text box).
info.info.s6.p1: In Advanced options → Advanced you can pick an entrance animation for the floating buttons (30 available: meteor shower, pinball, domino, Big Bang, popcorn…). The default is Random, which changes on every task without repeating the previous one. “None” disables them. On leaving the editor there's always the same exit animation (they hide to the right).
info.info.s7.p1: In Advanced options you can export all your settings (shortcuts, buttons, highlighter lists, Gems, etc.) to a .json file and import it back anytime or on another computer.
info.info.s8.linux: Same as Windows (<kbd>Alt</kbd> and <kbd>Ctrl</kbd>). If an <kbd>Alt</kbd>+letter opens a browser menu, rebind that shortcut from the popup.
info.info.footer: Remember to disable the old extensions (MxM Tools Final and MxM Lyrics Compare) to avoid duplicated buttons and shortcuts.
info.info.fn.unir: Joins the current line with the previous one.
info.info.fn.split: Splits the line at the cursor position.
info.info.fn.unirParens: Like Join lines, but the joined text stays in parentheses. A checkbox picks uppercase/lowercase.
info.info.fn.wrapParens: Wraps the SELECTED text in parentheses; its checkbox picks uppercase or lowercase for the first letter.
info.info.fn.wrapQuestion: Wraps the SELECTED text in ¿ ?; its checkbox picks uppercase or lowercase for the first letter.
info.info.fn.wrapExclaim: Wraps the SELECTED text in ¡ !; its checkbox picks uppercase or lowercase for the first letter.
info.info.s4.flashNote: Tip: for the Gems to work well, pick a Flash model (Flash 3.5 or newer). The Pro model takes too long and sometimes misbehaves.
info.info.s5.li5: New: select text and right-click to add it to a highlighter list from the browser's context menu.
info.info.s5.li6: Manage lists and items from the popup: add or remove the words/phrases of each list, create or delete lists, and edit the opened songs list (view, remove, or add a song by hand).
info.info.fn.wordCounter: Select text, then press ⌘A/Ctrl+A twice quickly: the 2nd press shows words/characters while you hold it. ⌥X toggles the counter.
info.info.fn.gem: With text selected, finds the video and sends it to the transcription Gem.
